'''âw-th-l''' ('''kawathal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cachinnate|cachinnate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cachinnate|cachinnate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-th-l
|-
! Lemma
| kawathal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwathal|thiwathal]] || [[word:jiwathal|jiwathal]] || [[word:shiwathal|shiwathal]] || [[word:kiwathal|kiwathal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwathal|thuthuwathal]] || [[word:jujuwathal|jujuwathal]] || [[word:shushuwathal|shushuwathal]] || [[word:kukuwathal|kukuwathal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwathal|thuwathal]] || [[word:juwathal|juwathal]] || [[word:shuwathal|shuwathal]] || [[word:kuwathal|kuwathal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwathal|thuwathal]] || [[word:juwathal|juwathal]] || [[word:shuwathal|shuwathal]] || [[word:kuwathal|kuwathal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewathal|thewathal]] || [[word:jewathal|jewathal]] || [[word:shewathal|shewathal]] || [[word:kewathal|kewathal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowathal|thothowathal]] || [[word:jojowathal|jojowathal]] || [[word:shoshowathal|shoshowathal]] || [[word:kokowathal|kokowathal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowathal|thowathal]] || [[word:jowathal|jowathal]] || [[word:showathal|showathal]] || [[word:kowathal|kowathal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowathal|thowathal]] || [[word:jowathal|jowathal]] || [[word:showathal|showathal]] || [[word:kowathal|kowathal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwathal|thĂŠwathal]] || [[word:jĂŠwathal|jĂŠwathal]] || [[word:shĂŠwathal|shĂŠwathal]] || [[word:kĂŠwathal|kĂŠwathal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawathal|thathawathal]] || [[word:jajawathal|jajawathal]] || [[word:shashawathal|shashawathal]] || [[word:kakawathal|kakawathal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawathal|thawathal]] || [[word:jawathal|jawathal]] || [[word:shawathal|shawathal]] || [[word:kawathal|kawathal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawathal|thawathal]] || [[word:jawathal|jawathal]] || [[word:shawathal|shawathal]] || [[word:kawathal|kawathal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawathal|shawathal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawathal|goshawathal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawathal|gokishawathal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawathalnĂŒ|shawathalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawathalnknĂŒ|goshawathalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathalnĂŒ|gokishawathalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawathalshĂ«|shawathalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawathalnkshĂ«|goshawathalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawathalshĂ«|gokishawathalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathalro|shawathalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathalnkro|goshawathalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathalro|gokishawathalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathalmu|shawathalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathalnkmu|goshawathalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathalmu|gokishawathalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawathalsher|shawathalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawathalnksher|goshawathalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawathalsher|gokishawathalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawathalng|shawathalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawathalnkng|goshawathalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawathalng|gokishawathalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawathalya|shawathalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawathalnkya|goshawathalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawathalya|gokishawathalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawathalyam|shawathalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawathalnkyam|goshawathalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawathalyam|gokishawathalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathalnĂŒshĂ«|shawathalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawathalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawathalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathalnĂŒro|shawathalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathalnknĂŒro|goshawathalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathalnĂŒro|gokishawathalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathalnĂŒmu|shawathalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathalnknĂŒmu|goshawathalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathalnĂŒmu|gokishawathalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathalshĂ«nĂŒ|shawathalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawathalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawathalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathalshĂ«ro|shawathalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathalnkshĂ«ro|goshawathalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathalshĂ«ro|gokishawathalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathalshĂ«mu|shawathalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathalnkshĂ«mu|goshawathalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathalshĂ«mu|gokishawathalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathalronĂŒ|shawathalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathalnkronĂŒ|goshawathalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathalronĂŒ|gokishawathalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathalroshĂ«|shawathalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathalnkroshĂ«|goshawathalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathalroshĂ«|gokishawathalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathalromu|shawathalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathalnkromu|goshawathalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathalromu|gokishawathalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathalmunĂŒ|shawathalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathalnkmunĂŒ|goshawathalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathalmunĂŒ|gokishawathalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathalmushĂ«|shawathalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathalnkmushĂ«|goshawathalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathalmushĂ«|gokishawathalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathalmuro|shawathalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathalnkmuro|goshawathalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathalmuro|gokishawathalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
